description_long: This factory building features a modern industrial design with a mix of materials, including dark concrete, brick, and large glass panels. The structure is rectangular with a flat roof, and one side is accented with a wood-textured facade. A prominent smokestack rises from the side, adjacent to an outdoor terrace area equipped with a large umbrella and seating. The upper floor includes a glass-walled section and a balcony with a pool, while the ground floor has expansive windows that suggest open, well-lit interior spaces. The building's exterior is punctuated by several long, narrow industrial-style windows, and the overall appearance is sleek and contemporary.
description: A modern industrial factory building with mixed materials, large glass windows, a smokestack, and an outdoor terrace. Features include a wood-accented facade, balcony pool, and prominent industrial windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dark facade, vertical windows, and the smokestack with the terrace and umbrella visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the split facade with dark concrete and wood textures, and two rows of long industrial windows.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entrance, large glass windows, balcony pool, and the smokestack with the terrace area.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the terrace with umbrella, glass doors, and the smokestack extending above the roofline.
